jobs.title: Product manager Intern 107654
jobs.description:
About the Hiring Team
Level Infinite is Tencent’s global gaming brand. It is a global game publisher offering a comprehensive network of services for games, development teams, and studios around the world.
We are dedicated to delivering engaging and original gaming experiences to a worldwide audience, whenever and wherever they choose to play while building a community that fosters inclusivity, connection, and accessibility. Level Infinite also provides a wide range of services and resources to our network of developers and partner studios around the world to help them unlock the true potential of their games.

What the Role Entails
Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research to understand UA advertising structures within the industry. Leverage the Al-powered capabilities to assist in planning and developing new features for the overseas gaming publishing platform.
• Support the creation of product requirement documents and user stories, organize product roadmaps, and collaborate with R&D and testing teams to implement the products.
• Collaborate with product operations, data analysis, and data science teams to identify business service cases and transform data-driven insights into product features.
• Understand the overseas game publishing and operational processes, gather insights from business feedback, analyze data, and propose optimization suggestions for the product.

Who We Look For
Qualifications:
• This position is open to students pursuing a master’s or above degree (no specific major required; marketing, computer science, or related fields preferred) .
• Passionate about Al and proficient in leveraging Al tools to turn ideas into reality
• Strong interest in the gaming industry, with an understanding of player behavior and market trends.
• Fluent in English, capable of using it as a working language.
• Proficiency in product prototype design tools; data analysis skills are a plus.

Equal Employment Opportunity at Tencent
As an equal opportunity employer, we firmly believe that diverse voices fuel our innovation and allow us to better serve our users and the community. We foster an environment where every employee of Tencent feels supported and inspired to achieve individual and common goals.
Work Location: UK-London

jobs.title: 运营策划实习生（时空中的绘旅人）
jobs.description:
1. 协助策划正式员工完成游戏内各系统的功能、界面及操作相关设计工作，参与方案讨论与细节完善；
2. 协助进行游戏策划资源的整理、对接，配合完成策划各模块协同的沟通与基础协调工作；
3. 协助撰写策划案、数据表格、需求说明、测试需求等基础文档，整理文档资料并做好归档；
4. 协助跟进游戏系统制作进度，配合整理测试用例，协助QA完成版本测试相关辅助工作，保障版本推进；
5. 关注市场二次元、女性向同类游戏产品动态，收集用户反馈与产品运营信息，协助提出优化建议；
6. 完成上级安排的其他策划相关辅助工作，在实践中学习岗位核心工作流程。
1. 热爱游戏行业，熟悉核心二次元游戏、女性向游戏，对游戏系统、文案、美术设计有基础认知与兴趣；
2. 游戏阅历丰富，深度体验过多款女性向/二次元游戏，了解女性用户游戏偏好与需求；
3. 逻辑思维清晰，具备基础的文案撰写、表格整理能力，学习能力强，愿意主动钻研策划相关工作；
4. 具备良好的沟通表达能力与团队协作意识，工作认真细致、有责任心，积极主动完成交办任务；
5. 2027年及之后毕业的全日制在校生，能保证充足的实习时间（可全职实习优先），对游戏运营策划工作有强烈的从业意愿，有相关游戏策划实习/课程作业/个人作品者优先。

jobs.title: AI创新增长实习生（内容策划与热点运营方向）
jobs.description:
1.负责内容方向策划，策划可批量复制的爆款内容选题与模版，输出给外部创作者及工作室进行规模化生产；
3.基于APP内角色与玩法，结合小红书、B站、抖音等平台特性，运营自持营销账号，策划并发布内容，带动目标用户转化；
3.紧跟暑期热点动态，快速响应并产出内容方向建议，确保内容与热点保持同步；
4.参与内容审核与质量把控，对投稿内容进行筛选、分类和反馈，持续优化内容模版库；
5.运用AI工具辅助完成内容创意生成、文案撰写、素材制作等环节，提升内容策划效率；
6.追踪站外平台（小红书/B站/抖音等）的内容趋势与爆款逻辑，定期输出热点风向标及选题建议。
1.全日制高校在校学生，2027年及以后毕业，一周至少保证5天坐班，能实习4个月以上优先；
2.有较好的内容审美和网感，熟悉小红书/B站/抖音等平台的内容调性和爆款逻辑；
3.对二次元文化、ACG圈层有较深理解，文游创建师（AI捏人/人设创作）或OC角色创建师（原创角色创作）经验者优先；
4.熟练使用主流AI创作工具，能通过AI辅助完成内容策划、素材生成、文案优化等工作；
5.有自持社交媒体账号运营经验或有爆款内容产出经验者优先；
6.具备良好的沟通协作能力，能高效对接外部创作者和工作室群体。

jobs.title: 【精英实习】游戏客户端引擎开发实习生（图形向）
jobs.description:

3、熟悉C/C++、掌握至少一门脚本语言。具备良好的编程习惯和代码风格，注重代码的可维护性和通用性。

jobs.title: 【精英实习】项目管理实习生（世界之外）
jobs.description:
成为PM团队成员，参与产品长线运营的项目管理工作，具体如下：
1、制定项目的计划和时间表；
2、负责推动团队日常执行工作，负责进度跟踪和控制，确保工作按计划完成；
3、负责团队内部敏捷项目管理流程和工具的执行，并从项目管理的观点和角度对团队内部流程进行推进和优化；
4、建立清晰、透明和高效的沟通机制，保持对项目管理状态的洞察与信息同步。
1、具备良好的逻辑思维、判断力、沟通表达能力，具备较强的抗压能力，能够及时识别并解决风险和问题，工作细致认真，态度积极乐观，热爱团队合作；

4、2027年及之后毕业的全日制在校生，近期可入职，可实习6个月及以上。

jobs.title: 本地化营销（葡语）
jobs.description:
【我们是谁？】
网易专注竞技射击品类的荒野事业部，十几年只做一件事：打磨最纯粹的竞技射击体验！
强竞技，是刻在基因里的底色；做精品，是融入血脉的追求；我们以极致产品力为信仰，用热爱创造快乐，用实力传递快乐！

• 二周年全球下载破两亿，活跃/付费创新高，新玩法+新地图持续规划中~

西语营销实习

jobs.title: 招聘HR实习生（网易云音乐）
jobs.description:
1、负责网易云音乐实习生招聘全流程，包括但不限于招聘信息发布、简历搜寻、面试安排、HR面试、offer推进等，零距离参与招聘全流程工作；
2、协助部分社招全职岗位工作，通过招聘渠道主动开源简历、推进面试、跟进面试结果；
3、基于日常招聘数据进行数据分析，复盘招聘问题、提升招聘效率；
4、协助完成其他HR事务性工作，如雇主品牌、正式校招项目、事业部级新人培训等；
5、使用AI工具，运用AI进行市场信息收集、招聘数据分析及复盘等工作。
1、2027年及之后毕业的全日制在校生，近期可入职，每周可到岗5天，至少4个月实习期；
2、做事细心、认真负责、团队合作意识强，为用人资源的补齐及组织能力的提升而思考；

5、熟练使用AI工具者优先，有Agent探索尝试者优先。

jobs.title: 全栈开发实习生
jobs.description:

jobs.title: Video Generation Foundation Model Researcher 107513
jobs.description:
Business Unit
LIGHTSPEED STUDIOS is made up of passionate players who advance the art & science of game development through great stories, great gameplay, and advanced technology. We are focused on bringing next generation experiences to gamers who want to enjoy them anywhere, anytime, across multiple genres and devices.

About the Hiring Team
Lightspeed Tech Center is a R&D department under Lightspeed Studios which develop PUBG Mobile and other high-quality games. Our Tech Center leads the research, exploration, and discovery of innovative technologies and provides technical services for all games during all phases of life cycle, including engine, audio, QA, AI, next generation game, technical cooperation, etc.

What the Role Entails
- Develop AI systems for high-quality 3D model and scene generation from text descriptions or images, tailored for advanced game development.
- Apply expert knowledge in 3D geometry, texturing, and scene construction to produce sophisticated and realistic game assets.
- Collaborate with cross-disciplinary teams to integrate 3D models and scenes seamlessly into gaming environments, thereby enhancing player experience.
- Conduct ongoing research and apply the latest trends and technologies in 3D model and scene generation.
 

Who We Look For
- PhD degree in Computer Vision, Computer Graphics, Mathmatics, Game Design, Digital Arts or a related field, graduating from September 2025 to Dec 2026.
- Extensive experience in 3D model and scene generation. 
- Strong research ability with publications in top computer vision and graphics conferences and journals (such as CVPR, ICCV, ECCV, SIGGRAPH, SIGGRAPH Asia, NIPS, ICML, PAMI, IJCV, TOG, TVCG, etc.).
- Demonstrated skills in 3D geometry, texturing, and scene construction.
- Excellent communication skills with a proven record of effective collaboration in a team environment.
Preferred:
- Proficiency in 3D modeling software (e.g., Maya, Blender, 3DS Max) and game engines (e.g., Unity, Unreal Engine).
- A substantial portfolio or published work showcasing a wide range of 3D model and scene-related projects.
- In-depth knowledge of scripting and automation within 3D modeling software.
#LI-RL1

Equal Employment Opportunity at Tencent
As an equal opportunity employer, we firmly believe that diverse voices fuel our innovation and allow us to better serve our users and the community. We foster an environment where every employee of Tencent feels supported and inspired to achieve individual and common goals.
Work Location: UK-London

jobs.title: Mechanical Engineering Intern 107667
jobs.description:
Business Unit
LIGHTSPEED STUDIOS is made up of passionate players who advance the art & science of game development through great stories, great gameplay, and advanced technology. We are focused on bringing next generation experiences to gamers who want to enjoy them anywhere, anytime, across multiple genres and devices.

About the Hiring Team
Lightspeed Tech Center is a R&D department under Lightspeed Studios which develop PUBG Mobile and other high-quality games. Our Tech Center leads the research, exploration, and discovery of innovative technologies and provides technical services for all games during all phases of life cycle, including engine, audio, QA, AI, next generation game, technical cooperation, etc.

What the Role Entails
At Lightspeed Studios NA our studios are game development-oriented, and we are eager to explore pioneering technologies that can navigate future tech requirements. We foster a collaborative and innovative environment where interns can make a real impact. Join us as we push the boundaries of technology! 🚀
The Opportunity:
We are seeking a highly motivated and talented Mechanical Engineering Intern to join our dynamic team. This internship offers a unique opportunity to work on cutting-edge projects at the intersection of mechanical design, hardware development, and embedded systems. You will contribute to the design, prototyping, and testing of innovative mechanical and electromechanical systems. This role is ideal for a Master's level student or recent graduate eager to apply their academic knowledge to real-world challenges.
What You'll Do:
Design and Develop: Participate in the design and development of mechanical components and systems, utilizing CAD software and rapid prototyping techniques.
Hardware Integration: Assist in the assembly, integration, and testing of mechanical hardware with embedded systems and electronic components.
Prototyping & Fabrication: Get hands-on experience building and iterating on physical prototypes. This may involve 3D printing, machining, and other fabrication methods.
System Testing & Validation: Contribute to the development and execution of test plans to validate system performance and reliability.
Software Interaction: Work with embedded systems and utilize your C++ skills for tasks related to system control, data acquisition, or interfacing with mechanical hardware.
Linux Environment: Operate within a Linux development environment for specific project tasks.
Documentation: Prepare and maintain technical documentation, including design specifications, assembly instructions, and test reports.
Collaboration: Work closely with a multidisciplinary team of engineers (mechanical, electrical, software) to achieve project goals.

Who We Look For
Who You Are:
Currently pursuing or recently completed a Master's degree in Mechanical Engineering or a closely related field.
Solid understanding of mechanical engineering principles, including statics, dynamics, materials science, and thermodynamics.
Proficient in C++ programming.
Familiarity with the Linux operating system and command-line interface.
Experience with embedded systems (e.g., microcontrollers, sensors, actuators).
Demonstrable hardware building skills and a hands-on approach to problem-solving.
Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
Excellent communication and teamwork skills.
Eagerness to learn and adapt in a fast-paced environment.
Bonus Points For: ⭐
Proficiency in CAD software (e.g., SolidWorks, Autodesk Inventor, Fusion 360).
Experience with microcontrollers (e.g., Arduino, Raspberry Pi, STM32).
Knowledge of common communication protocols (e.g., I2C, SPI, UART).
What You'll Gain:
Hands-on experience in a professional engineering environment.
Exposure to the full product development lifecycle.
Mentorship from experienced engineers.
Opportunity to contribute to meaningful projects.
Enhanced skills in mechanical design, hardware development, C++, Linux, and embedded systems.

Location State(s)
US-Washington-Bellevue

jobs.title: PUBG MOBILE Marketing and Communication Assistant Intern 107493
jobs.description:
Business Unit
Tencent Games was established in 2003. We are a leading global platform for game development, operations and publishing, and the largest online game community in China.
Tencent Games has developed and operated over 140 games. We provide cross-platform interactive entertainment experience for more than 800 million users in over 201 countries and regions around the world. Honor of Kings, PUBG MOBILE, and League of Legends, are some of our most popular titles around the world.
Meanwhile, we actively promote the development of esports industry, work with global partners to build an open, collaborative and symbiotic industrial ecology, and create high-quality digital life experiences for players.

What the Role Entails
This role serves as the PUBG Mobile France market intern focusing on campaign execution and social & community localization. The position supports local community engagemen, creates market-adapted creatives, understands French mobile shooter & Gen Z users for PUBG Mobile in FranceSocial & Community Operations: Support day-to-day social media and Discord community management for the Western European (WEU) market. This includes the localization of marketing assets and the adaptation of copy to ensure alignment with local market preferences.
Marketing Campaign Execution: Assist in the implementation of marketing campaigns. Responsibilities include drafting creative scripts, supporting content production, and providing on-site operational support for shoots or offline events to ensure content accuracy.
Social Media Activations: Develop and execute local community engagement activities on social platforms under the guidance of Communication Managers.
Market Benchmarking: Monitor and report on gaming industry trends, influencer activities, and competitor social media campaigns within the designated home market.
Business Development Support: Assist in the growth of local brand partnerships by participating in meetings with potential partners and supporting the coordination and execution of collaborative projects.

Who We Look For
Passionate about gaming, familiar with battle royale or shooter mobile games is a plus.
Undergraduate or postgraduate student majoring in Marketing, Communication, Gaming, Business, or related fields.
Strong execution skills with good communication, coordination, and reporting abilities; detail-oriented and responsible.
Strong interest in marketing campaigns, brand collaborations, and cross-cultural marketing; able to adapt to a fast-paced, multi-tasking environment.
Comfortable identifying emerging trends and translating them into strong creative concepts.
Familiar with using social media platforms for content posting, community monitoring, and performance reporting; experience with Discord is a strong plus.
Excellent communication, presentation, organizational and writing skills.
Native French speaker is preferred and proficiency in English as the business language is required.

Equal Employment Opportunity at Tencent

Work Location: France-Paris

jobs.title: Internal Audit Intern – Singapore 106714
jobs.description:
Business Unit
At Tencent Finance, we are deeply committed to fostering the professional growth of our staff through tailored finance training, mentorship programs, job rotation initiatives, and support for finance professional certifications. Recognized as an approved employer by esteemed organizations like ACCA, HKICPA, CIMA, CPA Australia, and CA, and certified accredited trainer with the Singapore Accountancy Commission, we provide comprehensive resources and guidance to ensure our employees remain at the forefront of the rapidly evolving finance landscape. Whether you're a recent graduate or an experienced hire, we empower you to acquire and maintain professional qualifications, enhancing your credibility and competence in the finance domain while keeping you competitive in the ever-changing industry.

What the Role Entails
Tencent is seeking an internal audit intern to support its overseas business operations, including gaming, cloud, payment, and procurement. This internship offers a unique opportunity to gain hands-on experience in IT risk assessment, internal controls, and regulatory compliance within a dynamic global organization. You will work closely with experienced auditors to analyze business processes, identify risk areas, and provide recommendations to strengthen internal controls. If you have a keen interest in IT internal auditing, risk management, and compliance, this role provides an excellent foundation for your career in audit and financial governance.
Responsibilities
Assist in conducting independent audit assessments of Tencent’s overseas business operations, reviewing business processes, identifying key risk areas, and evaluating the effectiveness of risk management and internal control systems.
Conduct interviews, review documents, and prepare work papers documenting audits of key internal controls and key operational processes.
Communicate audit findings with management teams, track the progress of remediation efforts, and ensure corrective actions are effectively implemented.
Provide value-added audit support, including assisting in regulatory inspections and contributing to audit-related training initiatives.
Conduct data analysis and process reviews to improve internal control mechanisms and enhance operational efficiency.
Communicate the results of projects via written or oral persentations to supervisor.

Who We Look For
Currently pursuing a bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, or a related field, with graduation in year 2027.
Able to commit to a 4--6 month full-time internship.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with an ability to assess business risks and evaluate internal control effectiveness.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills in both English and Mandarin to prepare audit documentation, reports and presentations.
Prior internship experience in internal/external audit, IT compliance, or risk management is highly preferred.
Highly detail-oriented with a proactive mindset and the ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment.

#LI-JY1

3、 深度挖掘京东海量用户行为日志（涵盖购买、加购、点击等），设计面向转化目标的多粒度Reward信号体系，将真实用户反馈转化为模型优化信号；
4、 构建与完善面向工业界Agent的系统性评测体系，以多维度的评测数据驱动底层算法能力的持续迭代与升级。
1、 获得本科及以上学历，计算机、人工智能等相关专业；
2、 具备扎实的强化学习理论基础，熟练掌握PPO、GRPO、DPO等主流对齐与强化学习算法；
3、 具备大语言模型（LLM）后训练实践经验，熟悉SFT、RLHF或RLAIF等核心技术流程；
4、 具备Agent训练、工具调用(Tool-use)或多步推理相关的实战经验，或在相关AI顶级会议有高质量论文发表记录；
5、 熟练使用PyTorch深度学习框架，具备大规模分布式训练的实际工程经验。

jobs.title: 运筹大模型供应链决策系统优化
jobs.description:

2、 运用运筹学、深度神经网络及大模型等技术手段，构建高效的业务优化模型，并持续改进算法以提升业务效率与降低成本；

1、 获得本科及以上学历，运筹学、工业工程、应用数学、计算机科学等相关专业；
2、 精通运筹优化算法（涵盖线性规划、整数规划、动态规划、随机优化及强化学习等），具备扎实的实际项目落地经验；
3、 具备深厚的运筹学理论基础，在相关领域的顶级学术期刊或会议上有高质量论文发表记录；
4、 精通Python等一门或多门开发语言，熟练掌握常用数据结构与算法，具备使用建模语言实现复杂模型的工程能力；
5、 具备海量与复杂数据处理经验，熟悉Hadoop、Spark等分布式计算框架，有应用优化模型解决战略和战术业务决策的实战经验；
6、 具备优秀的团队合作精神与英语读写能力，能够无障碍阅读和理解前沿专业英文文献。

1、参与蛋仔派对海外版本事件、热点营销等工作的创意输出；参与海外社区活动执行，协助官方宣发物料落地等工作。
2、追踪海外主流平台（YouTube、Facebook、Instagram、TikTok等） 内容趋势与热点，透过流量表象识别背后的用户兴趣变化和传播规律，为创意方案提供有洞察力的输入；
3、协助审核、验收供应商交付物料，统计相关外部数据、核实成效。
4、根据项目需求，协助在目标地区筛选合适KOL进行建联工作，审核KOL合作内容，监测和收集发布后数据和玩家评论反馈。
5、积极学习和探索AI工具在数据整理、内容趋势分析等方面的应用，提升工作效率。
1、在校本科/研究生，每周可保证至少4天出勤，能连续实习3个月以上。
2、有网感、对时下热点内容有敏感度。具有出色的沟通能力，能灵活处理多方协调工作。熟练使用Office等办公软件。
3、具备较强的责任心、耐心和严谨性，有合规意识，能谨慎处理工作内容。
加分项：
• 有网红营销相关工作经验者优先。
• Roblox或蛋仔派对深度玩家，有做过成熟UGC地图者优先。
• 做事细心，有责任感，有财会相关基础或市场营销、广告、新闻专业背景优先。
• 一周5日全勤者优先。

jobs.title: FDE实习生-飞书商业化
jobs.description:
ByteIntern：面向2027届毕业生（2026年9月-2027年8月期间毕业），为符合岗位要求的同学提供转正机会。
团队介绍：飞书商业化团队（Go to Market）负责将飞书先进产品和服务全面推向中国和国际市场，通过制定精准的业务战略，进行破圈的市场营销，深入理解不同行业的趋势和特点，传递飞书的理念和价值给不同行业的企业客户并达成业务合作，帮助客户加强使用深度和广度，最终让飞书成为各行各业先进企业的首选、持续助力企业组织升级。目前已在中国、新加坡、美国、日本等国家和地区建立了商业化团队，开启了为全球各行各业组织和个人提升创造力和效率的历程。

1、飞书致力于将最先进的AI技术（如大语言模型、智能助手等）转化为企业日常使用的生产力工具；作为一名前沿部署工程师（FDE），你将成为飞书AI产品与各行各业真实业务需求之间的关键桥梁；你的核心任务是：走到企业客户的真实工作场景中去，深入了解他们的业务难题，并亲自动手使用飞书的AI工具，为他们搭建出切实可行的、能解决问题的智能工作流方案；
2、业务调研与痛点分析：配合资深的商务或渠道经理，参与企业客户（涵盖制造、零售、电商、餐饮等行业）的实地调研；通过沟通，准确理解客户在日常办公、业务运转中遇到的低效环节和痛点，能够发现AI落地实践可能性；
3、AI方案的动手搭建：基于对客户业务的理解，熟练运用飞书现有的AI产品能力（如AI智能助手、自动化工作流、多维表格等无代码/低代码工具），亲自动手配置和搭建出能够直接演示、甚至直接投入使用的解决方案模型（Demo）；
4、经验总结与资产沉淀：当你成功用AI解决了一个行业的痛点后，你需要将这个过程总结为一套“标准化的使用指南（SOP）”和“演示模板”；这套模板将被提供给全国的销售团队或合作伙伴，帮助他们去服务更多同行业的客户；
5、生态伙伴的赋能培训：随着你经验的积累，你将负责把搭建AI方案的技巧和经验，以培训或技术支持的形式传递给飞书的代理商和生态合作伙伴，帮助他们提升服务客户的能力。
1、2027届本科及以上学历在读，专业不限，“计算机/信息技术类”与“商科/管理类”复合背景（如信息管理与信息系统、商业分析等）优先；
2、动手意愿与技术敏感度：你不需要是专业的程序员，但你必须对AI、大模型等新技术充满热情，并乐于钻研和实际操作各种软件工具（熟悉基本的逻辑判断、数据结构或有无代码开发经验者优先）；
3、优秀的逻辑分析与沟通能力：能够将复杂的业务问题拆解为清晰的逻辑步骤；同时，具备良好的表达能力，能够把专业的技术方案用通俗易懂的语言向客户或非技术人员解释清楚；
4、强烈的探索精神与韧性：面对未知和没有现成答案的新场景，能够保持好奇心，主动寻找解决方案，并享受在不断试错中获得成功的成就感。
jobs.source: 字节跳动校园招聘官网

jobs.title: 国际电商Agent应用与ToolRL探索
jobs.category: 多模态大模型与应用方向
jobs.description:
1、 国际电商场景 Agent 需求与方案设计：深度拆解国际电商全链路业务场景（跨境商品运营、多语种客服、供应链履约、海外营销、合规风控、采销决策等），梳理业务痛点与自动化需求，设计适配跨境场景的智能 Agent 架构、任务流程、工具生态，输出可落地的产品与技术方案；
2、 Agent 体系研发与落地迭代：负责国际电商场景 Agent 的全流程开发，包括多语种意图理解、任务规划、记忆管理（Memory）、Skill / 工具编排、多步复杂任务执行、异常容错机制建设；联动产品、业务、前端团队，完成 Agent 功能落地、线上验证与持续优化，保障业务可用、稳定、高效；
3、 ToolRL 技术探索与工程落地：针对国际电商 Agent 的工具调用、任务决策、多步执行链路，开展 Tool Reinforcement Learning 相关技术探索，优化 Agent 工具选择、调用顺序、执行轨迹的决策能力；解决跨境场景下多语种、多工具、多规则约束下的 Agent 决策不稳定、 hallucination、工具调用失败等核心问题，提升 Agent 任务成功率与业务适配性；
4、 数据体系建设与模型能力迭代：负责国际电商 Agent 场景的埋点体系、行为数据采集、标注与治理，搭建场景专属数据集；基于线上真实交互数据，通过 ToolRL、微调、上下文工程、轨迹优化等方式，持续迭代 Agent 底层模型能力，搭建业务数据飞轮，实现模型能力的持续闭环提升；
5、 业务价值对齐与方案落地管控：深度对齐国际电商业务目标与商业化诉求，在 Agent 功能设计、技术方案迭代时，充分评估对业务效率、成本管控、海外合规、用户体验的影响；联动技术、业务、产品团队，推进技术方案与业务目标深度对齐，保障 AI 能力切实落地产生业务价值；
6、 行业前沿跟踪与技术沉淀：跟踪国际电商、智能 Agent、ToolRL、多语种大模型领域的前沿技术与业界最佳实践，结合公司跨境业务特点，完成技术预研、方案选型与落地复用；沉淀场景化技术方案、规范与组件，支撑团队 AI 能力体系化建设。
1、 获得本科及以上学历，计算机、人工智能、自动化等相关专业；
2、 具备深厚的数学与算法功底，精通LLM预训练或后训练流程，深刻理解多智能体系统(MAS)或强化学习(RL)的基本原理；
3、 具备优秀的工程代码实现能力，熟练掌握PyTorch、DeepSpeed或Megatron-LM等框架，能够处理复杂的多模态数据流；
4、 熟悉AgentGym、MetaGPT、AutoGen等智能体系统框架，并具备深度开发经验；
5、 在大模型、智能体领域有扎实的项目落地经验，或在相关顶级学术会议有高质量论文成果记录；
6、 具备极强的学习与沟通能力，有担当且具备优秀的团队合作精神。

jobs.title: 多智能体联合训练与协同推理探索
jobs.category: 多模态大模型与应用方向
jobs.description:
1、 设计并实现面向电商复杂业务场景的高可用、高扩展性多智能体协作系统，支持复杂业务链路下的任务协同与决策优化；
2、 构建基于大语言模型的智能体协作框架，优化智能体在动态环境中的任务规划(Planning)、工具调用(Tool Use)与跨智能体协作能力，提升相关实际业务指标；
3、 探索多智能体任务分解与协同执行机制，实现复杂业务流程的智能化自动编排与闭环执行；
4、 探索并实现基于LLM的多智能体联合训练框架，研究如何通过Proposer-Solver-Judge(提案-求解-评判)等博弈机制实现智能体能力的闭环自增；
5、 针对多体环境下的非稳态(Non-stationarity)挑战设计鲁棒的联合训练机制，优化信用分配(Credit Assignment)策略，精准量化各智能体在长路径决策中的贡献度；
6、 探索多模态信息（文本、代码、结构化数据）融合的统一表示与生成技术，提升模型对异构信息的理解与操作精度；
7、 通过指令微调(SFT)与偏好对齐(RLHF/DPO)，优化模型在电商垂域的知识与价值观对齐，构建场景感知的智能体“大脑”。
1、 获得本科及以上学历，计算机、人工智能、自动化等相关专业；
2、 具备深厚的数学与算法功底，精通LLM预训练或后训练流程，深刻理解多智能体系统(MAS)或强化学习(RL)的基本原理；
3、 具备优秀的工程代码实现能力，熟练掌握PyTorch、DeepSpeed或Megatron-LM等框架，能够处理复杂的多模态数据流；
4、 熟悉AgentGym、MetaGPT、AutoGen等智能体系统框架，并具备深度开发经验；
5、 在大模型、智能体领域有扎实的项目落地经验，或在相关顶级学术会议有高质量论文成果记录；
6、 具备极强的学习与沟通能力，有担当且具备优秀的团队合作精神。

jobs.title: 低代码编程智能体的自动化质量校验能力研究
jobs.category: 多模态大模型与应用方向
jobs.description:
1、 研究电商领域低代码CodingAgent全链路质量校验方法（涵盖代码/测试生成、依赖安装及构建运行），提升智能体产出代码的正确性与可维护性；
2、 设计低代码质量评测体系，结合静态分析、端到端测试及LLM-as-a-Judge等手段，构建可复用的自动化校验框架；
3、 研发适配智能体平台的校验Harness、任务回放与失败归因能力，实现从需求理解到验证报告的闭环度量与落地；
4、 探索基于多Agent协同的代码审查、缺陷定位与自动修复策略，提升智能体在复杂仓库、多语言与多框架场景下的泛化能力；
5、 参与课题验证与业务落地，沉淀相关技术文档、专利或高质量学术论文，推动成果在京东研发效能及运营场景中的应用。
1、 获得本科及以上学历，计算机科学、软件工程、人工智能等相关专业；
2、 具备扎实的编程能力、数据结构与算法基础，熟悉Python、Java、JavaScript/TypeScript、Go等至少一种主流语言及常用工程工具链；
3、 熟悉大语言模型、Agent、工具调用、RAG、Prompt Engineering及模型评测相关技术，能将模型能力与工程系统结合；
4、 了解软件工程质量保障方法，包括单元测试、集成测试、静态分析、代码审查、CI/CD、覆盖率分析或安全扫描等；
5、 具备CodingAgent、AI编程助手、自动化测试生成、代码大模型或评测基准建设等相关研究或实践经验；
6、 具有较强的问题抽象与实验设计能力，在智能化软件工程相关顶级学术会议或期刊有高质量论文发表记录。

jobs.title: 面向搜推算法特征治理的智能体系统研究和实现
jobs.description:
1、围绕搜索推荐系统中大规模特征生产链路复杂、数据血缘不清晰、特征复用率低、计算链路冗余严重等问题，开展面向特征工程智能治理的 Agent 系统研究与原型建设。参与构建 Feature Engineering Agent 系统，利用 Agent 的任务规划、工具调用、记忆机制、多步骤推理、结果校验与人机协同能力，实现对特征生产代码、任务 DAG、数据血缘和特征依赖关系的自动理解与治理。
2、参与设计和实现面向 SQL、Spark、Flink 等特征生产代码的解析工具链，并将代码解析、元数据查询、任务 DAG 查询、血缘分析、特征 profile 分析、资源成本估算等能力封装为 Agent 可调用工具。
3、研究特征血缘自动构建、冗余特征识别、特征复用推荐、特征依赖关系推理、DAG 优化建议生成等 Agent 工作流，使 Agent 能够在真实特征生产链路中完成复杂治理任务的拆解、执行、验证与解释。
4、探索单 Agent 与多 Agent 协作机制，构建 Code Understanding Agent、Lineage Agent、Feature Reuse Agent、DAG Optimization Agent、Risk Review Agent 等专业能力模块，支持复杂特征治理任务的自动化和半自动化处理。
5、参与构建 Agent 安全与可信机制，包括工具调用权限控制、结果证据追踪、置信度评估、幻觉检测、生产变更审批、风险提示与回滚建议，确保 Agent 输出可解释、可验证、可审计。
6、在真实搜索推荐业务场景中进行实验验证，评估 Agent 系统在血缘识别准确率、冗余特征发现率、特征复用推荐采纳率、计算资源节省、研发效率提升等方面的效果，并形成技术方案、系统原型、技术报告、专利或论文成果。

1、 获得本科及以上学历，计算机、人工智能、软件工程、数据科学等相关专业；
2、 具备扎实的数据结构与算法基础，熟练掌握Python、Java或Scala等至少一门编程语言，具备良好的系统设计与工程实现能力；
3、 深入理解大语言模型与Agent系统相关技术，熟悉任务规划(Planning)、工具调用(Tool Use)、记忆(Memory)及工作流编排等机制；
4、 熟悉SQL、Spark、Flink、Doris、Hive等大数据计算与存储框架，具备数据工程、特征工程、任务调度或数据血缘相关项目经历；
5、 了解代码静态分析、AST、SQL解析、任务DAG、知识图谱及元数据管理等技术栈；
6、 具备机器学习、信息检索、代码智能、数据治理或Agent系统相关科研或项目经验；
7、 具备优秀的问题抽象能力与科研素养，在相关顶级学术会议或期刊有高质量论文发表、专利产出或系统原型建设记录者优先。

jobs.title: 多模态大模型生成式搜推范式应用探索
jobs.category: 多模态大模型与应用方向
jobs.description:
1. 研发多模态商品理解模型，融合图像、文本、视频特征，优化跨模态特征对齐与检索算法；
2. 负责高质量多模态训练数据集构建，包含图像清洗、属性标注与图文匹配关系挖掘；
3. 探索多模态大模型在图像搜索领域的应用，提升模型在复杂商品数据上的泛化能力；
4. 设计多模态表征评测框架，集成自动化评估与人工审核机制，提升模型迭代效率；
5. 基于大语言模型（LLM）实现用户意图识别、生成式排序与重排及多目标优化；
6. 结合SFT、RLHF等技术实现生成式端到端推荐建模，持续优化搜推系统决策；
7. 利用奖励模型（Reward Model）与强化学习量化商业目标，构建长期生态价值体系；
8. 探索大模型推理机制，优化语义理解与认知能力，提升搜推系统的智能化水平。
1. 获得本科及以上学历，计算机、人工智能、自动化、数学、物理等相关专业；
2. 在CVPR、ICCV、NeurIPS、KDD、SIGIR、WWW、RecSys、ICLR、ICML、ACL等顶会有高质量论文发表记录，或在开源社区有突出贡献；
3. 精通PyTorch或TensorFlow，熟悉Llama、CLIP、BLIP等大模型调优及Hugging Face工具链；
4. 具备扎实的机器学习与深度学习基础，在多模态学习领域有模型训练与调试经验；
5. 熟悉大语言模型（LLM）基础原理，了解RecGPT、多Agent系统等前沿生成式推荐技术；
6. 具备良好的跨团队协作与项目管理能力，对大模型在搜推系统中的落地具有高度热情。

jobs.title: 大模型与AI搜索助手研究
jobs.category: 多模态大模型与应用方向
jobs.description:
1.探索大模型相关前沿技术，包括但不限于预训练、后训练、RAG、Agent等来提升大模型的通用理解和电商深度推理能力；
2.负责完全基于大模型驱动的AI搜索助手创新应用，探索通过Agentic，深度思考，RAG以及Memory等创新技术提升AI搜索的用户体验，打造AI电商搜索新范式；
3.跟踪前沿大模型研究成果和技术趋势，优化大模型电商知识增强、生成式推理搜推、深度思考等方向驱动AI搜索助手的不断创新；
1. 获得本科及以上学历，计算机、人工智能、自动化、数学、物理等相关专业；
2. 在NeurIPS, AAAI, ACL, ICML, SIGIR, KDD, WWW等AI相关顶级会议上有高质量论文发表记录；
3.熟悉大模型预训练以及后训练关键算法和策略，对Agent，知识注入、RAG，memory以及大模型在电商搜索的应用有前沿研究和浓厚兴趣；
4.深刻理解语言模型，深度学习等算法原理，需具备很强的算法开发以及编程落地执行能力，并具备较强的业务敏感度，能将需求和技术有效结合并落地。

jobs.title: Associate Account Representative, Intern 107662
jobs.description:
Business Unit
Cloud & Smart Industries Group (CSIG) is responsible for promoting the company's cloud and industry Internet strategy. CSIG explores the interactions between users and industries to create innovative solutions for smart industries via technological advancements such as cloud, AI, and network security. While driving the digitalization of retail, medical, education, transportation and other industries, CSIG helps companies serve users in smarter ways, building a new ecosystem of intelligent industries that connect users and businesses.

What the Role Entails
Partner and support senior members of the Sales team in the end to end customer account management lifecycle, including contract preparation, negotiation and ensuring smooth operational and administrative tasks for the customers.
Support for senior members for the preparation and execution of strategic account plans, status reports, sales and revenue forecasting and quota attainment, and get ready to be an independent sales person from the second year.
Utilize networking and prospecting skills to generate leads and identify strategic solution based sales opportunities.
Attend leading industry exhibitions with the Sales team in Europe and globally
Develop and manage high-value relationships with key client stakeholders.
Partner with the Business Contracts Manager on contract negotiations.
Achieve/exceed sales goals, sustain revenue growth and provide recommendations to enhance account growth and revenue potential.
Become proficient in Tencent’s cloud offerings, working to understand customers need and providing service solutions.
Develop strategic plans based on industry trending (FSI/Manufacturing&Energy/Pan-Internet/ISV) and customer analysis.
Work with Solutions Architect team / Marketing team in developing sales pitch materials & exhibition materials

Who We Look For
Strong interest in developing a Sales, Business Development and Account Management career in cloud services. Prior tech related internship experiences would be highly advantageous, include but not limited to cloud or software experience.
Exhibit “hunter” mentality and possesses outstanding ability to close sales;
Demonstrate a sense of strong ownership in the workplace.
Excellent English for presentation and communication; fluency in Chinese/German/French or other major European language would be a major plus.
Possesses strong interest and curiosity for technology; Prior knowledge of Cloud, CDN , SaaS industry and internet space is a plus
Adept at analyzing data, trends and the market to develop insights and key selling points

Equal Employment Opportunity at Tencent
As an equal opportunity employer, we firmly believe that diverse voices fuel our innovation and allow us to better serve our users and the community. We foster an environment where every employee of Tencent feels supported and inspired to achieve individual and common goals.
Work Location: UK-London

jobs.title: Project Management Intern, Gaming 107659
jobs.description:
Business Unit
LIGHTSPEED STUDIOS is made up of passionate players who advance the art & science of game development through great stories, great gameplay, and advanced technology. We are focused on bringing next generation experiences to gamers who want to enjoy them anywhere, anytime, across multiple genres and devices.

About the Hiring Team
Lightspeed Tech Center is a R&D department under Lightspeed Studios which develop PUBG Mobile and other high-quality games. Our Tech Center leads the research, exploration, and discovery of innovative technologies and provides technical services for all games during all phases of life cycle, including engine, audio, QA, AI, next generation game, technical cooperation, etc.

What the Role Entails
1. Game Co-dev Coordination & Resource Alignment: Align, identify, and sort out game product and technical requirements across diverse co-development partners, external game studios, and internal development teams; coordinate global resources to ensure clear scope boundaries and shared ownership.
2. Cross-region Game Milestone & Delivery Management: Formulate, track, and synchronize master project plans across different time zones and regions; manage the delivery pipeline of game assets (Art, Animation, Audio) and code integration to ensure multi-site milestones are met on time.
3. Cross-cultural Game Workflow & Standardization: Establish, optimize, and promote standard remote-collaboration workflows and communication protocols to bridge cultural gaps and language barriers, ensuring efficient game asset handovers and review processes.
4.Distributed Team Risk & Conflict Management: Proactively identify and solve project bottlenecks unique to distributed game development (e.g., communication lag, build integration friction, cultural mismatches) to minimize project risks and maintain alignment.
5. Game Industry & Tech Trend Research: Conduct deep-dive market and desk research on global gaming industries and emerging technology trends (including but not limited to Generative AI, AI-driven game development tools, and innovative gameplay metrics), delivering actionable insight reports.

Who We Look For
1. Global Mindset & Cross-cultural Communication: Exceptional cross-cultural communication, interpersonal, and translation/documentation skills; ability to comfortably collaborate with diverse stakeholders from different cultural and game development backgrounds.
2. Distributed Game Project Management: Solid understanding of the game development lifecycle (GDLC), with practical experience or strong knowledge in distributed/remote team management, art outsourcing coordination, or multi-site agile frameworks.
3. Game Research & Analytical Skills: Strong desk research capabilities with a high sensitivity to game market trends; familiar with AI toolsets (e.g., ChatGPT, Midjourney, Copilot) and how they apply to gaming tech or productivity improvement.
4. Language & Time-zone Adaptability: Proficient in English (and other languages depending on region) as a working language; high flexibility to work across different time zones to align with global game studios.
5. Preferred Qualifications: Experience living/studying abroad, prior internship in an international game studio (PMO/Outsourcing/Localization), or a deep gamer with insights into various genres is highly preferred.

Equal Employment Opportunity at Tencent
As an equal opportunity employer, we firmly believe that diverse voices fuel our innovation and allow us to better serve our users and the community. We foster an environment where every employee of Tencent feels supported and inspired to achieve individual and common goals.
Work Location: UK-London

jobs.title: 【有转正】人工智能算法实习生（用户画像方向）
jobs.description:
人工智能算法工程师，负责游戏AI匹配系统、推荐系统、异常行为识别等个性化游戏玩法系统的开发和优化工作。您将参与多款网易大型游戏的游戏开发流程中，基于海量游戏数据，利用游戏AI算法优化玩家体验。同时，密切跟进人工智能算法的前沿进展，探索下一代AI游戏的发展方向。

岗位优势：
1、场景丰富，人工智能算法在游戏业务中的价值已经验证但仍有比较大的发展空间；
2、学术氛围浓厚，有较强的学术研究传统，能够获得在顶会（期刊）合作发表论文的机会；
3、游戏是最优秀的算法实验田，时刻紧跟技术前沿，具备接触大模型等多种人工智能技术的机会
工作氛围好，培训和分享机会多，有利于职业成长。
岗位职责：
1、基于网易游戏海量用户数据、物料数据和行为数据进行玩家个性化算法研究和开发；
2、独立完成算法研究、上线和迭代优化；
3、对上线效果进行监控分析，基于分析结果对算法和策略进行持续优化；
4、基于对游戏的了解，发现游戏业务可以优化的点并充分发挥人工智能算法优势助力游戏增长。
岗位要求
1、本科及以上学历，计算机相关专业。热爱游戏，有网易游戏经验者更佳；
2、有一定的数据洞察能力，能够通过数据分析发现问题，并通过算法建模解决问题；
3、熟悉常用的机器学习、深度学习、数据挖掘算法。

jobs.title: 游戏美术商务助理实习生
jobs.description:
1.负责美术供应商对接与管理，在全球范围内对供应商资源进行拓展，维护核心供应商；
2.对供应商资源与人力进行日常管理，根据项目需求匹配最优解决方案，并能跟进执行最终合作落地；
3.具备资源挖掘能力，熟悉项目美术风格，根据项目需求匹配和拓展个人画师资源；
4.协调项目组、法务、财务和税务等多方跨职能合作，完成合同及结算等日常工作；
5.具备项目管理能力，熟悉使用各类表格统计，实时更新各项数据和维护进程管理。
1.2027届及以后毕业，本科及以上学历在读，人力资源/市场管理/艺术设计等相关专业优先，能立即到岗优先；
2.亲和力好、责任心强、抗压性好，具备多线程工作能力，可以统筹管理并进事项；
3.具备英文面对面沟通能力的优先，热爱游戏行业优先；
4.熟练使用excel等基本办公软件，正直诚信，坚守原则。

jobs.title: 特效设计实习生
jobs.description:
• 根据项目需求，利用UE特效引擎完成游戏中特效设计以及战斗、表演、活动、场景、物件等特效制作；
• 参与游戏开发过程，与项目团队合作，确保特效的质量和效果达到项目标杆要求。
• 在校大学生，数字媒体艺术、动画、视觉传达、游戏设计等相关专业优先；
• 热爱游戏，并将理想定位在游戏行业，熟悉使用UE特效引擎，熟悉相关工具的操作和特效制作流程；
• 扎实美术功底与优秀审美能力；
• 深入理解特效运动规律、结构造型，兼具静态设计思维与动态效果把控力；
• 具备良好沟通能力，能高效完成上下游沟通的协作能力。思维逻辑清晰，有团队和合作精神；
• 具备快速学习能力以及钻研精神，美术与技术双修；

加分项：
• 美术能力：具备较强的原画能力，能够完整绘制特效设计稿；
• 技术能力：对新技术敏感且极具深度探索精神。如：掌握Shader编写、工具脚本能力，掌握多种特效软件使用能力。

作品要求：
• 游戏、动漫相关设计、绘制作品。静帧作品请提交常见的图片格式(jpg/tga/tiff/pag/bmp)，图片压缩率不要太大，以免影响画面质量，请不要提交带图层文件体积过大的psd工程文件；
• 3D作品请提供效果截图，请不要提交原始工程文件；
• 动画、序列帧作品请提交常见的视频格式（mp4/avi/wmv/mov)，视频文件在保证画面质量的前提下可以适当的压缩输出，以免提交文件过大造成传输不便。

jobs.title: 投放运营实习生
jobs.description:
、数据报告优化:协助优化联盟广告的日报/周报/月报模板,提升数据呈现效率,使用Excel/Google Sheets进行数据清洗、自动化计算及基础可视化,定期输出核心指标分析(如消耗、曝光、Rol等)；
2、投放监控与优化:实时监控联盟广告投放数据(曝光、点击、转化等),识别异常波动,记录渠道优化需求,跟进优化进度,协助对渠道表现进行初步分类(如高曝光低转化渠道)；
3、产品资源管理:维护Offer清单,确保产品信息(费率、地区、状态)准确更新,结合数据表现输出优先级建议表协助优化产品推荐策略,提升渠道匹配效率职位要求；
任职要求】
1、掌握数据透视表、VLOOKUP函数等基础数据分析功能,能通过公式/模板实现日报自动化更新(如自动计算ROI/消耗环比)；
2、每周到岗≥4天，连续实习≥3个月；
3、市场营销/广告/统计学/信息管理优先；
4、接触过广告平台后台（Google Ads/Meta/TikTok for Business等），了解联盟营销（Affiliate）或效果广告基础概念，CET-6及以上优先；
5、本科及以上在校学生，不限专业；

jobs.title: 网易LOFTER推荐算法实习生（含转正机会）
jobs.description:
网易LOFTER是国内主流的年轻人兴趣社区，为千万级年轻用户服务。LOFTER算法团队主要负责其中搜索推荐，用户增长，商业化等场景的算法研发和应用。
1. 参与LOFTER搜索推荐核心算法的研发：如召回排序算法、大模型LLM多模态内容建模等；以用户体验，流量效果和商业目标等方向设计和迭代算法，促进产品发展；
2. 参与LOFTER搜索推荐用户增长算法设计与调优，促进拉新效率和留存效果，增加用户粘性，防止用户流失；
3. 参与LOFTER搜索推荐技术创新和应用，如可解释推荐模型，交互式搜索推荐等，给用户带来全新的使用体验。
4.参与【算法模型优化——用户DPV建模及多目标融合】的事项，预计能在引导用户深度消费、重度互动行为上带来收益。

1.2026年及之后毕业的全日制在校生，硕士及以上学历；
2.计算机、信号处理、控制论、博弈论、运筹优化，统计等相关专业；数据挖掘，自然语言处理等研究方向优先；
3.熟悉常见的机器学习算法；有深度学习，强化学习等方向研究和应用经历的优先
4.能熟练使用Java，Python编程中的一种；熟悉常用的深度学习框架如TF，Pytorch；能熟练使用大数据分析相关工具如hadoop，spark，flink的优先。
5.表现优秀提供转正机会。

jobs.title: 【精英实习】推荐算法实习生（LOFTER）
jobs.description:
网易LOFTER是国内领先的年轻人兴趣社区，数据智能团队专注于探索与实践行业前沿的推荐搜索算法技术，致力于为LOFTER上的年轻用户和创作者提供优质的内容消费与创作体验。团队在技术创新方面成果显著，部分研究成果已发表于 WWW、SIGIR 等国际顶级学术会议。

1、参与LOFTER推荐系统核心算法的研发与优化，涵盖召回排序模型Scaling Up、LLM用户理解、多模态内容理解等前沿方向；围绕用户体验、流量效率和商业目标进行算法设计与迭代，驱动产品持续发展。
2、参与推荐侧用户增长算法的设计与调优，提升新用户拉新效率与老用户留存效果，增强用户粘性，降低用户流失风险。
3、参与推荐搜索领域的前沿技术创新与落地实践，如可解释推荐模型、交互式搜索推荐等，为用户带来全新的产品使用体验。
1、2027年及之后毕业的全日制在校生，硕士及以上学历；
2、计算机、信号处理、控制论、博弈论、运筹优化，统计等相关专业；数据挖掘，自然语言处理等研究方向优先；
3、熟悉常见的机器学习算法；有深度学习、强化学习等方向研究和应用经历的优先；
4、能熟练使用Python编程；熟悉常用的深度学习框架如TF、Pytorch；能熟练使用大数据分析相关工具如hadoop、spark、flink的优先。能熟练使用AI工具提效工作的优先。
5、表现优秀提供转正机会。

jobs.title: 社会化营销实习生
jobs.description:
1、热点推歌与内容策划： 负责网易云音乐在社会化媒体（微博、抖音、小红书、B站等）的日常营销与推歌工作。能够敏锐捕捉社会热点、情绪共鸣点，结合平台歌曲库，策划并执行出圈的内容话题；
2、AI制歌与创意落地： 探索并应用AI音乐工具，辅助AI制歌项目。利用AI技术降低创作门槛，让技术与创意结合，制造营销爆点；
3、校园大使体系搭建与建联： 负责校园大使团队的建设、维护与运营。建立并维护全国高校渠道关系，策划校园落地活动，激活校园创作者生态，让网易云音乐的声音深入年轻圈层；
4、整理并记录市场的各项数据，定期分析数据复盘优化投放结果。
1、2027年及之后毕业，保证每周到岗五天及6个月以上的实习期，需要尽快入职；
2、对社交媒体高度敏感，网感好，能快速理解并捕捉内容热点；
3、具备良好的文案基础和创意构思能力，逻辑清晰；
4、乐于沟通，团队协作能力强，具备较强的责任心与自驱力；
5、对ai工具有高兴趣，愿意学习并探索ai工具的诸多可能（非常重要）。

【加分项】
是网易云音乐的深度用户
自己有玩音乐、编曲、写词的经历
有校园渠道资源，或曾担任过校园大使/社团负责人
究极大E人

jobs.title: 用户增长实习生（广告投放方向）
jobs.description:
1、广告投放执行： 辅助主流信息流广告平台（巨量引擎、腾讯广告、百度营销、快手磁力等）的日常投放操作，包括账户搭建、计划创建、出价调整、预算分配等；
2、付费用户获取： 围绕平台会员/付费业务，协同团队制定并执行拉新获客投放策略，持续优化注册、付费等核心转化指标；
3、数据监控与分析： 实时监控投放数据，运用AI工具进行日常数据监控和同步，及时发现数据波动并提出优化建议；
4、素材协同： 与内容团队、外部代理紧密配合，基于投放数据反馈提出素材迭代方向；
5、流程优化： 协助团队沉淀投放SOP、素材库及方法论，推动投放效率提升；
1、2027年及之后毕业的全日制在校生，近期可入职，可保证连续实习4个月以上；
2、具备信息流广告投放实操经验，有过真实账户的投放操作，了解归因逻辑、深度转化回传等投放技术概念；
3、有以下至少一项付费用户获取相关投放经验者优先：
①知识付费/会员类投放（如知乎会员、得到等）
②短剧/影视会员类投放
③电商付费转化投放（如直营电商、二类电商）
④具备基础的数据分析能力（熟练使用Excel，了解SQL或BI工具者加分）。
⑤对互联网广告生态有好奇心，愿意主动研究新平台、新玩法。

jobs.title: 菲律宾策略运营实习生-TikTok Shop
jobs.description:
日常实习：面向全体在校生，为符合岗位要求的同学提供为期3个月及以上的项目实践机会。
团队介绍：TikTok Shop是TikTok旗下的内容电商。平台汇聚全球优质商家与创作者，通过短视频、直播等多场景连接消费者，让新奇好物畅销全球，让美好生活触手可得。目前团队分布在美国、英国、法国、印尼、墨西哥、中国等全球多个国家和地区，在这里你将有机会深入国际场景，面向全世界商家及用户，和跨区域团队协作，共同探索创新购物模式。期待和优秀的你一起创造更多可能！

1、协助研究热门视频、平台用户行为、达人内容形式以及特定类目的内容机会，并将其转化为适合TikTok Shop商家和品牌使用的策略；协助为品牌合作伙伴撰写“视频创作简报”，包括：识别相关趋势、内容切入点、达人表现形式、视频前三秒利益点以及商品故事化营销的机会点；
2、促成并协调TAP视频机构与商家之间的撮合对接，确保沟通顺畅、文档记录以及项目进度的及时更新；
3、协助监控机构、商家及内部利益相关方的时间节点、跟进事项、材料提交和关键交付物；协助处理团队安排的其他日常临时性工作；
4、追踪TAP项目的整体表现，包括机构参与度、商家覆盖率、视频产出量、大促活动进度及其他相关指标；提供数据汇总、洞察和进度分析，协助团队识别业务卡点、发现机会并制定下一步计划；
5、维护和更新面向机构的外部文档，包括：进度追踪表、操作指南、活动简报、入驻材料、常见问题解答及其他运营参考资料。
1、本科及以上学历在读；
2、有过电商流量运营用户增长、电商互动玩法运营、用户增长钱效等经验；
3、数据分析能力佳，结构化思维，数据驱动；
4、有与跨平台渠道、跨职能和跨产品领域团队合作的经验；
5、自我激励，目标导向；
6、有国际化工作/学习背景者优先；熟练掌握英语，可以作为工作语言。
jobs.source: 字节跳动校园招聘官网

jobs.title: Solution Architect Intern 107660
jobs.description:
Business Unit
Cloud & Smart Industries Group (CSIG) is responsible for promoting the company's cloud and industry Internet strategy. CSIG explores the interactions between users and industries to create innovative solutions for smart industries via technological advancements such as cloud, AI, and network security. While driving the digitalization of retail, medical, education, transportation and other industries, CSIG helps companies serve users in smarter ways, building a new ecosystem of intelligent industries that connect users and businesses.

What the Role Entails
Serve as a subject matter expert in both IT and business domains, identifying, understanding, and defining customer needs, objectives, and business requirements.
Collaborate with global IT teams and local operations teams abroad to deliver optimal IT and cloud infrastructure solutions for Tencent's Europe Gaming business.
Offer professional technical advisory and support to our Europe business, encompassing solution preparation and evaluation, Proof of Concept (POC), demonstration, and professional service delivery.
Drive the adoption of existing IT solutions within the business based on need and value, representing feedback from the business to the IT department.
As a key member of Tencent Europe IT team, coordinate business demand and IT requirement review meetings, producing high-quality reports on business requirements and other essential IT documentation.
Regularly engage with relevant cross-functional stakeholders (business and IT in both HQ and Overseas), to manage expectations and provide updates on product and project status.
Continuously enhance IT product and solution management processes, focusing on improving Speed to Market through initiatives such as process optimization, automation, self-service, and supportability.
Define and deliver quantitative and qualitative data-driven analytics and metrics to drive and measure product capabilities adoption, customer satisfaction, and continuous improvements.

Who We Look For
Self-motivated, articulate, and passionate to deliver the best result and achieve the highest customer satisfaction. Quick learner.
Love satisfying customers with a state-of-the-art cloud solution, automation, realizing ideas, building services, and unlocking the potential of new technology!
Collaborative, independent, insistent, flexible, and open-minded. And you see no conflict in any of these things.
Knowledgeable, resourceful, and show initiative. You always keep the customer’s objectives in mind.
Positive by nature, a great team player, and both dependable and autonomous.
Customer-oriented and could work at a very fast pace.

Equal Employment Opportunity at Tencent
As an equal opportunity employer, we firmly believe that diverse voices fuel our innovation and allow us to better serve our users and the community. We foster an environment where every employee of Tencent feels supported and inspired to achieve individual and common goals.
Work Location: UK-London

jobs.title: Game Community Intern 107657
jobs.description:
About the Hiring Team
Level Infinite is Tencent’s global gaming brand. It is a global game publisher offering a comprehensive network of services for games, development teams, and studios around the world.
We are dedicated to delivering engaging and original gaming experiences to a worldwide audience, whenever and wherever they choose to play while building a community that fosters inclusivity, connection, and accessibility. Level Infinite also provides a wide range of services and resources to our network of developers and partner studios around the world to help them unlock the true potential of their games.

What the Role Entails
We are looking for a passionate and highly community-driven Community Intern to support our PC and Console game publishing efforts in London.
This role is ideal for someone who is deeply familiar with gaming communities, internet culture and player conversations. You will help create engaging community content, identify viral opportunities, support communication with players, and work closely with internal teams to translate gameplay updates into player-friendly messaging.
The ideal candidate is both a hardcore gamer and a creative community native - someone who understands what players care about, speaks their language, and knows how to make content feel authentic, timely, and shareable.
Responsibilities1. Support day-to-day community operations for PC and Console game titles across key social and community platforms. 
2. Create and contribute ideas for engaging, and player-relevant community content, including memes, short videos, social posts, and trend-led content. 
3. Monitor player discussions, community sentiment, gameplay feedback, and emerging trends across platforms such as Discord, Reddit, TikTok, YouTube, X, Twitch, and other relevant channels. 
4. Help identify high-potential community creators, KOLs, streamers, and gaming influencers.
5. Translate gameplay updates, feature changes, events, and patch notes into community-friendly language that resonates with players. 
6. Work closely with publishing, marketing and development teams to ensure player-facing messaging is accurate, engaging, and authentic. 
7. Help collect, organize, and summarize community feedback for internal teams. 
8. Stay up to date with PC/Console gaming trends, player culture, memes, creator content, and competitor community activities. 

Who We Look For
1. A hardcore PC and/or Console gamer with strong knowledge of gaming culture, player communities, and online gaming conversations. Previous game operations/community experience is preferred.
2. Strong understanding of internet culture, memes and youth-oriented social media trends. 
3. Good sense of what makes content engaging, authentic, and shareable within gaming communities. 
4. Strong written English communication skills, with the ability to write in a natural, player-friendly, and community-native tone. 
5. Comfortable communicating with both players and internal teams, including developers and publishing stakeholders. 
6. Passion for PC/Console games, especially multiplayer, shooter, action, RPG, live-service, or community-driven titles. 
7. Proactive, creative, detail-oriented, and comfortable working in a fast-moving environment. 
Nice to Have
1. Experience managing or contributing to gaming communities, fan pages, Discord servers, Reddit communities, or social channels. 
2. Video editing, image editing, or content production skills. 
3. Previous internship or project experience in gaming, entertainment, social media, community, marketing, or content creation. 

Equal Employment Opportunity at Tencent
As an equal opportunity employer, we firmly believe that diverse voices fuel our innovation and allow us to better serve our users and the community. We foster an environment where every employee of Tencent feels supported and inspired to achieve individual and common goals.
Work Location: UK-London

jobs.title: 内容推广策划实习生
jobs.description:

2、直播活动策划：熟悉直播行业，了解主流直播平台调性，根据产品需求策划线上/线下直播活动，并提供专业性的规划；

4、数据分析：基于活动效果，整理数据并分析，针对后续工作提供可参考性建议。
1、每周至少实习4个工作日,能实习3个月或以上，可以尽快到岗全勤者优先考虑 ;
2、重度社交媒体用户,熟悉抖音快手b站小红书任一平台玩法的优先考虑，了解主流社媒平台内容趋势和热点；
3、有较好的沟通能力和文字功底，拥有较强的内容策划和创新思维、有过短视频内容策划经历更佳；
4、具有高度的责任心和独立处理问题的思维，工作高效，做事细心，能承受一定工作压力。
【重要加分项】
1、SLG、MMO、足球类等游戏爱好者，了解游戏最新行业资讯；
2、有自媒体账号运营经历，熟悉短视频平台流量机制与平台特性。

jobs.title: Game AI Product Management Intern 107504
jobs.description:
Business Unit
LIGHTSPEED STUDIOS is made up of passionate players who advance the art & science of game development through great stories, great gameplay, and advanced technology. We are focused on bringing next generation experiences to gamers who want to enjoy them anywhere, anytime, across multiple genres and devices.

About the Hiring Team
Lightspeed Tech Center is a R&D department under Lightspeed Studios which develop PUBG Mobile and other high-quality games. Our Tech Center leads the research, exploration, and discovery of innovative technologies and provides technical services for all games during all phases of life cycle, including engine, audio, QA, AI, next generation game, technical cooperation, etc.

What the Role Entails
Track domestic and international cutting-edge developments in AI generative models and intelligent agents (AI Agents), conduct market research and trend analysis on AIGC technologies, products, and applications.
Assist product managers in driving the application of AIGC technologies in gaming, combining insights into gaming business and evaluations of LLM/Agent model capabilities to formulate technical implementation plans.
Design innovative solutions integrating gameplay with AI agents, coordinate resources to ensure high-quality project delivery.
Develop data and technical standards for AIGC/AI Agent-related gaming products, design scenario-based application solutions, and operational demonstration plans.
Explore deep integration of AI agents into gaming scenarios (e.g., NPC interactions, procedural content generation, dynamic narratives), and optimize synergies between technical capabilities and user experience.

Who We Look For
Bachelor’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Software Engineering, AI, Data Science, or related fields.
Passion for the gaming and internet industries; familiarity with AI agent principles and frameworks; prior experience in technical prototyping or scenario-based implementation is a plus.
Basic understanding of development, testing, and operational workflows; strong product mindset and analytical skills.
Exceptional creativity and systematic design ability, capable of independently drafting requirements documentation and coordinating cross-team communication.
Bonus points：
AI Technical Proficiency: Solid grasp of AI fundamentals and mainstream algorithms, with deep expertise in at least one AI domain (e.g., generative models, reinforcement learning) and its practical limitations.
AI Agent Expertise: Hands-on experience researching AI agent technologies, familiarity with mainstream frameworks, and awareness of deployment challenges.
Gaming AI Experience: Prior work applying AI in gaming contexts (e.g., smart NPCs, dynamic environment generation, player behavior prediction).

Equal Employment Opportunity at Tencent
As an equal opportunity employer, we firmly believe that diverse voices fuel our innovation and allow us to better serve our users and the community. We foster an environment where every employee of Tencent feels supported and inspired to achieve individual and common goals.
Work Location: New Zealand-Auckland

jobs.title: Research Intern — Coding LLMs 107653
jobs.description:
Business Unit
Technology Engineering Group (TEG) is responsible for supporting the company and its business groups on technology and operational platforms, as well as the construction and operation of R&D management and data centers, TEG provides users with a full range of customer services. As the operator of the largest networking, devices, and data center in Asia,TEG also leads the Tencent Technology Committee in strengthening infrastructure R&D through internal and distributed open source collaboration, constructing new platforms and supporting business innovation.

What the Role Entails
We are looking for research interns to work on foundational areas for coding language models, including pre-training data, mid-training data, synthetic data generation, evaluation, and agentic coding.
Responsibilities
* Explore data-centric methods for improving coding LLMs, including data filtering, quality assessment, deduplication, data mixture, and diversity analysis.
* Build synthetic data and evaluation pipelines for code generation, code editing, repo-level reasoning, tool use, and multi-step coding tasks.
* Run experiments to analyze how data, model, and training strategies affect coding capabilities.
* Work with large-scale code corpora, developer activity data, and agentic coding trajectories.

Who We Look For
* Strong programming skills in Python.
* Solid understanding of machine learning and large language models.
* Familiarity with LLM pre-training, mid-training, code models, data curation, evaluation, agents, or tool use.
* Strong experiment design, data analysis, and problem-solving skills.
* Interest in code intelligence, software engineering automation, and agentic coding.
Preferred Qualifications
* Experience with code data processing, GitHub-scale data, synthetic data, LLM evaluation, semantic deduplication, or agentic coding.
* Research experience, publications, or open-source projects in related areas are a plus.
What We Offer
* Access to large-scale real-world coding data and agentic trajectories.
* Rich compute resources and model APIs for fast research iteration.
* Opportunities to work on real-world coding model applications and the full model development loop.

Equal Employment Opportunity at Tencent

jobs.title: Ad Recommendation Algorithm Intern Engineer 107652
jobs.description:

As a professional support platform, CDG also supports the company and various business groups in strategic planning, investments and mergers, investor relations and corporate global communications, marketing and public relations, and more.

What the Role Entails
Deeply understand overseas advertising business scenarios. Identify opportunities for technical enhancement through keen data insights, and continuously optimize recommendation strategies and models to improve core business metrics.
Explore and conduct research on cutting-edge recommendation technologies.Be responsible for the development and performance optimization of overseas advertising recommendation algorithms. You will focus on one of the following specific areas:
Model & Algorithm: Optimize estimation models for precise ranking (pCTR/pCVR/pLTV) and recall(LTR). This includes but is not limited to research in ultra-long sequence modeling, multimodal large models for recommendation, multi-scenario & multi-task learning, and scaling up complex cross networks.
Bidding Mechanism: Optimize algorithmic strategies for cost attainment, volume scaling, and cold start. This includes but is not limited to applying reinforcement learning and generative bidding techniques.
Industry-Specific Algorithms: Optimize models and strategies for key industries such as gaming and e-commerce. This includes but is not limited to exploring AI-powered intelligent delivery solutions.

Who We Look For
Bachelor's degree or above in Computer Science, Mathematics, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field.
Solid programming skills and algorithmic foundation, proficient in at least one programming language such as Python, C++, Go, or Scala.
Strong theoretical foundation in machine learning/deep learning, proficient in at least one mainstream deep learning framework like TensorFlow or PyTorch.
Familiar with the use of big data platform tools like Hadoop, Spark, or Flink.
Excellent logical thinking, problem analysis, and problem-solving skills. Passionate about tackling challenging problems.
Strong communication skills, proactive work attitude, high sense of responsibility, self-motivated, committed to continuous learning, and excellent teamwork ability.

jobs.title: World Model Research Intern 107225
jobs.description:
About the Hiring Team
Level Infinite is Tencent’s global gaming brand. It is a global game publisher offering a comprehensive network of services for games, development teams, and studios around the world.
We are dedicated to delivering engaging and original gaming experiences to a worldwide audience, whenever and wherever they choose to play while building a community that fosters inclusivity, connection, and accessibility. Level Infinite also provides a wide range of services and resources to our network of developers and partner studios around the world to help them unlock the true potential of their games.

What the Role Entails
专注于 World Model（世界模型）及 Video Diffusion Model（视频扩散模型）的前沿算法研究与开发，探索视频生成、视频交互等关键问题。作为生成式人工智能研究工作者（实习生），你将参与一项或多项任务：
协助大规模视频/图像数据的清洗、过滤、标注及预处理流程，构建高质量的训练数据集。
协助搭建高效的扩散模型训练框架，优化训练流程，负责模型训练任务的管理、监控与调优。
深度参与项目技术讨论，主动提出创新性想法或改进方案，并积极推动研究成果在游戏视频生成、虚拟世界构建场景中的实际落地与转化。
与资深研究员紧密合作，共同探索数字内容生成与交互式智能体领域的前沿方向。

Who We Look For
就读于计算机视觉、计算机图形学或相关专业的博士或硕士研究生, 熟悉常见的生成模型。
扎实的深度学习基础，具备图片或视频数据处理的基本经验，能够独立处理复杂的数据清洗与流水线搭建任务。
对生成式 AI 在互动娱乐和虚拟世界构建中的应用有浓厚兴趣。
具备良好的沟通与协作能力。
优先条件:熟悉常见的视频生成模型，并有模型训练或微调经验者优先。
有在 CVPR, ICCV, ECCV, ICLR, ICML, NeurIPS 等顶级会议或期刊发表过相关论文的经验者优先。

Equal Employment Opportunity at Tencent
As an equal opportunity employer, we firmly believe that diverse voices fuel our innovation and allow us to better serve our users and the community. We foster an environment where every employee of Tencent feels supported and inspired to achieve individual and common goals.
Work Location: Singapore-CapitaSky

jobs.title: Financial Accounting and Analysis Intern (4-6 Months) 107631
jobs.description:
Business Unit
At Tencent Finance, we are deeply committed to fostering the professional growth of our staff through tailored finance training, mentorship programs, job rotation initiatives, and support for finance professional certifications. Recognized as an approved employer by esteemed organizations like ACCA, HKICPA, CIMA, CPA Australia, and CA, and certified accredited trainer with the Singapore Accountancy Commission, we provide comprehensive resources and guidance to ensure our employees remain at the forefront of the rapidly evolving finance landscape. Whether you're a recent graduate or an experienced hire, we empower you to acquire and maintain professional qualifications, enhancing your credibility and competence in the finance domain while keeping you competitive in the ever-changing industry.

What the Role Entails
Join our dynamic Tencent Finance team as Financial Accounting and Analysis Intern where you'll have the opportunity to immerse yourself in real-world accounting and financial practices. You will be having the exposure to the end-to-end accounting and finance processes, focusing either on General Ledger, Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable and Finance Operations, offering you tailored hands-on experience in the complex commercial and business environment. This role is designed to provide you with a deep understanding of financial processes, contributing directly to the accuracy and efficiency of our financial reporting and operations.
Responsibilities
Maintain and reconcile the General Ledger (GL), ensuring accurate and timely financial entries.
Assist in month-end and year-end closing activities, including account reconciliations, financial statement preparation, and variance analysis.
Verify, process, and manage Accounts Payable (AP) transactions, ensuring timely vendor payments and handling any discrepancies.
Support Accounts Receivable (AR) activities by assisting in customer invoicing, tracking payments, and managing overdue receivables.
Collaborate with teams to streamline Finance Operations, helping to enhance process efficiency and support financial audits by preparing relevant documentation.
Ensure compliance with company policies and accounting standards, contributing to continuous improvements across finance functions.

Who We Look For
Currently pursuing a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Accountancy or a related discipline.
Able to commit to a full-time internship for 4 to 6 months.
Demonstrated ability to apply accounting knowledge in practical scenarios, particularly in identifying and resolving issues.
Strong analytical and presentation skills.
Proficiency in both English and Chinese Mandarin is required, as the role involves regular communication with China-based stakeholders and handling financial documents in both languages.

Tencent Overseas IT has the mission to empower Tencent’s rapid global growth with future ready, global IT platforms, applications and services. Distributed Training Engineering: Participate in the implementation of large-scale distributed training solutions; own the engineering delivery of data parallelism, model parallelism (Tensor Parallelism / Pipeline Parallelism), and ZeRO techniques; continuously tune GPU utilization and ensure the stability of ultra-large-scale training jobs.
2. Compute Scheduling Optimization: Take a deep role in developing and optimizing AI job scheduling logic; Address compute bottlenecks in complex gaming scenarios through fine-grained resource management, fault self-healing mechanisms, and efficient checkpointing strategies.

2. Core Tech Stack: Proficient in at least one of Python / C++ / Go; deep understanding of the PyTorch framework; hands-on experience engineering distributed training with DeepSpeed, Megatron-LM, or equivalent frameworks.
3. Solid understanding of distributed systems principles; Familiarity with NCCL, RDMA networking, or high-performance storage is a plus; working knowledge of containerized infrastructure (Docker / Kubernetes).

部署紹介/Business Unit
全世界で12億人以上のユーザーを誇る WeChat は、中国と世界中の人々、サービス、企業をつなぎ、モバイルの未来を大きく変革しています。海外市場で WeChat Pay として知られる Weixin Pay は、2013年にWeixinによって導入されたモバイル決済ソリューションです。銀行口座と Weixin Pay アカウントを連携させることで、ユーザーは迅速かつ便利で、安全な決済や取引をスムーズに完了できます。
中国国内では、Weixin Pay は日常生活のあらゆる場面に溶け込み、オンラインまたはオフラインを問わず、小売、飲食、交通、ヘルスケア、レジャーといったさまざまな分野で、効率的かつスマートな決済サービスを提供しています。日本においては、WeChat Pay チームが日本市場全体でのサービス拡大に尽力しています。
With over 1.2 billion users worldwide, WeChat is changing the mobile landscape by connecting people, services, and businesses in China and around-the world. Weixin Pay, referred to as WeChat Pay in overseas markets, is a mobile payment solution jointly launched by Weixin in 2013. After bundling their Weixin Pay accounts with bank cards, Weixin Pay users can pay and complete transactions in a fast, convenient, and secure manner.
In China, Weixin Pay touches almost every aspect of everyday life, providing both online and offline services and giving users a highly efficient and intelligent payment experience, particularly in retail, dining, transportation, healthcare and leisure, and more. The WeChat Pay team in Japan is responsible for its increasing in all aspects of Japanese markets.

仕事内容/What the Role Entails
- 业务运营（Business Operations）：与 Business Development（BD）团队协作，加强客户关系并探索业务机会。
- 与 Key Account（KA）商户或机构就接入、物料及活动等事项进行协作推进。
- 市场调研，包括但不限于：
A. 门店巡检（Store Inspection）：实地走访线下门店，确认物料铺设情况。
B. 市场动态（Market Dynamics）：通过线上调研、行业报告及实地走访，定期收集关键市场信息，对支付生态健康度进行评估与对比。
C. 用户调研（User Research）：通过线下走访或线上问卷，统计用户渗透率及用户体验情况。
- 物料铺设（Material Deployment）：针对机构较难覆盖的区域或场景，安排线下物料部署。
- 合作拓展（Collaboration Exploration）：与大学社团、核心商圈等建立合作，推进用户社区营销渗透，实地观察消费场景，开展调研与数据分析，并探索微信生态内的合作机会。
- ビジネスオペレーション（Business Operations）：Business Development（BD）チームと連携し、顧客関係の強化およびビジネス機会の開拓を推進。
- Key Account（KA）加盟店・機関と連携し、導入、販促物、キャンペーン施策等の推進を行う。
- 市場調査（Market Research）：以下を含むが、これらに限定されない。
A. 店舗巡回（Store Inspection）：オフライン店舗を訪問し、販促物の設置状況を確認。
B. 市場動向調査（Market Dynamics）：オンライン調査、業界レポート、現地訪問を通じて重要な市場情報を定期的に収集し、決済エコシステムの健全性を評価・比較。
C. ユーザー調査（User Research）：現地訪問やオンラインアンケートを通じて、ユーザー浸透率およびユーザー体験に関するデータを収集。
- 販促物展開（Material Deployment）：機関側ではカバーが難しいエリアやシーンに対して、現地での販促物設置を実施。
- 協業開拓（Collaboration Exploration）：大学サークルや主要商業エリア等との連携を推進し、ユーザーコミュニティ向けマーケティング浸透を実施。現地で消費行動を観察し、調査・データ分析を行いながら、WeChatエコシステム内での協業機会を探索。

応募資格/Who We Look For
- 具备优秀的沟通能力，性格积极热情，能够以流利的中文和日语与总部同事及国际相关方进行沟通协作
- 具备较强的项目管理与执行能力，能够输出高质量的总结与分析报告
- 拥有较强的自驱力与自我管理能力，能够独立、主动地推进并完成工作任务
- 熟悉微信及微信支付（WeChat Pay）产品生态
- 優れたコミュニケーション能力を持ち、積極的かつ熱意のある性格。中国語・日本語ともに流暢で、本社メンバーや海外ステークホルダーとの円滑な連携が可能
- 高いプロジェクトマネジメントおよび実行力を有し、質の高いサマリー・分析レポートを作成可能
- 高い主体性とセルフマネジメント能力を持ち、自律的かつ積極的に業務を推進・完遂できる
- WeChatおよびWeChat Payのプロダクトエコシステムへの理解がある

jobs.title: Technical Account Manager Intern 107540
jobs.description:
Business Unit
Cloud & Smart Industries Group (CSIG) is responsible for promoting the company's cloud and industry Internet strategy. CSIG explores the interactions between users and industries to create innovative solutions for smart industries via technological advancements such as cloud, AI, and network security. While driving the digitalization of retail, medical, education, transportation and other industries, CSIG helps companies serve users in smarter ways, building a new ecosystem of intelligent industries that connect users and businesses.

What the Role Entails
Tencent Cloud is expanding its global enterprise customer support capabilities and is seeking motivated individuals to join us as Technical Account Management Intern. As a TAM Intern, you will gain hands-on experience supporting enterprise customers throughout their post-sales cloud journey. Working alongside experienced Technical Account Managers, you will assist in monitoring cloud performance, supporting customer issue resolution, and contributing to solution optimization initiatives. This internship provides practical exposure to customer lifecycle management, cloud operations, and cross-functional collaboration. If you are passionate about cloud technologies and aspire to become a trusted technical advisor to enterprise clients, this role offers an excellent foundation.
 
Responsibilities
Assist Technical Account Managers in supporting enterprise customers across their post-sales lifecycle, including onboarding, solution validation, and operational follow-up
Support monitoring of cloud performance metrics and help identify potential optimization opportunities
Participate in customer meetings to document technical requirements, operational challenges, and follow-up actions
Assist in troubleshooting coordination by working with product and engineering teams to ensure timely resolution of customer issues
Contribute to preparation of customer reports, technical documentation, and service review materials
Support internal knowledge sharing and best practice documentation to enhance customer success operations

Who We Look For
Currently pursuing a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related technical disciplines; candidates from other majors with strong technical interest are encouraged to apply
Expected to graduate between Q4 2026 and 2027 and able to maintain valid student status during the internship
Available for a minimum 3-month full-time internship commitment
Basic understanding of cloud computing concepts such as IaaS, PaaS, SaaS, networking, and system architecture
Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills with good communication capabilities
Passionate about cloud technologies and customer success management
Proficient in both Korean and Chinese Mandarin to communicate with China headquarters stakeholders and support product material coordination

jobs.title: Agent Evaluation Intern 107491
jobs.description:
About the Hiring Team
Level Infinite is Tencent’s global gaming brand. It is a global game publisher offering a comprehensive network of services for games, development teams, and studios around the world.
We are dedicated to delivering engaging and original gaming experiences to a worldwide audience, whenever and wherever they choose to play while building a community that fosters inclusivity, connection, and accessibility. Level Infinite also provides a wide range of services and resources to our network of developers and partner studios around the world to help them unlock the true potential of their games.

What the Role Entails
We are hiring an intern to work on evaluation and reliability infrastructure for a real-world LLM agent system in the UA performance marketing field. The agent performs multi-step reasoning, retrieves context, selects tools, executes actions, handles user confirmations, and interacts with external services.
The goal of this internship is to build transferable expertise in agent evaluation engineering: evaluating tool use, measuring trajectory quality, designing benchmarks, analyzing traces, comparing model and prompt variants, and improving the reliability of agentic AI systems.
This role is ideal for someone interested in future opportunities in LLM agent evaluation, AI safety evaluation, research engineering, LLMOps, or applied AI infrastructure.Research the state-of-the-art agentic workflow evaluation frameworks in the industry and in the research field.
Apply the theory to build automated evaluation pipelines that can run agent scenarios, capture execution artifacts, score results, and detect regressions.
Evaluate tool-use behavior, including whether the agent selects the right tool, passes correct arguments, avoids unnecessary calls, and handles tool errors appropriately.
Analyze agent trajectories using traces, logs, intermediate steps, and final outputs to identify reasoning failures, context misuse, hallucinated assumptions, and brittle workflow patterns.
Design metrics for agent reliability, including success rate, tool-call precision, argument accuracy, recovery rate, retry count, latency, cost, and safety-related failure rates.
Create reusable evaluation datasets from synthetic cases, golden workflows, and real anonymized executions.
Support experiments comparing prompts, model providers, tool descriptions, memory strategies, context construction methods, and execution modes.
Help build human evaluation workflows and rubrics for judging agent correctness, faithfulness, usefulness, and risk awareness.
Work with engineers to translate evaluation findings into better tests, monitoring signals, tool interfaces, prompts, and guardrails.
Potentially compose research papers and publish in scientific conferences.

Who We Look For
Currently pursuing or recent graduates of a Master’s or PhD degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Software Engineering, Data Science, or a related field.
Strong Python fundamentals and interest in AI systems.
Curious about how LLM agents work, fail, and improve.
Interested in evaluation methodology, not just application building.
Comfortable reading logs, traces, test cases, and structured data.
Detail-oriented and able to define clear, measurable criteria for ambiguous agent behavior.
Prior experience with LLMs, LangChain-like agents, tool calling, pytest, data analysis, or observability tools is helpful but not required.

Equal Employment Opportunity at Tencent
As an equal opportunity employer, we firmly believe that diverse voices fuel our innovation and allow us to better serve our users and the community. We foster an environment where every employee of Tencent feels supported and inspired to achieve individual and common goals.
Work Location: UK-London

jobs.title: AI Agent Research & Application Intern 106432
jobs.description:
About the Hiring Team
Level Infinite is Tencent’s global gaming brand. It is a global game publisher offering a comprehensive network of services for games, development teams, and studios around the world.
We are dedicated to delivering engaging and original gaming experiences to a worldwide audience, whenever and wherever they choose to play while building a community that fosters inclusivity, connection, and accessibility. What the Role Entails
This role focuses on advancing AI Agent architecture, reasoning, and autonomy through applied research and experimentation. Interns will work on cutting-edge projects involving foundation models, planning algorithms, and multi-agent systems, contributing to both theoretical innovation and practical applications.
Key Responsibilities
• Conduct research on AI foundation models to enhance reasoning and data-driven analytical capabilities.
• Design and develop advanced planning and decision-making algorithms that enable Agents to autonomously perform complex tasks and improve operational efficiency.
• Investigate tool-use mechanisms to allow Agents to effectively integrate and utilize diverse data analysis and system tools for greater adaptability in real-world environments.
• Explore and implement end-to-end reinforcement learning frameworks and multi-agent collaboration algorithms to improve coordination and optimization across intelligent systems.

Who We Look For
Qualifications 
• Master’s or PhD student in Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field.
• Strong foundation in mathematics (linear algebra, probability, statistics) and excellent problem-solving skills.
• Solid understanding of machine learning and deep learning algorithms (e.g., neural networks, decision trees, SVMs, reinforcement learning), with hands-on implementation experience.
• Proficiency in Python and familiarity with mainstream ML/DL frameworks such as TensorFlow and PyTorch, with the ability to independently develop and train models.
Preferred Qualities:
• Deep curiosity and passion for autonomous systems, reasoning, and multi-agent collaboration.
• Ability to bridge theoretical research and practical application.
• Experience with reinforcement learning, tool-augmented LLMs, or agentic workflows is a strong plus.
• Proficiency in both English and Mandarin will be a plus.
• Minimum 6-month full-time internship preferred.

jobs.description:
部署紹介/Business Unit
LIGHTSPEED STUDIOS は、物語性の高いストーリー、没入感のあるゲームプレイ、最先端のテクノロジーを駆使し、ゲーム開発をアートとサイエンスの融合として追求し続けています。世界中のプレイヤー、そしてあらゆるデバイスに次世代のゲームエクスペリエンスを提供することを使命としています。
LIGHTSPEED STUDIOS is made up of passionate players who advance the art & science of game development through great stories, great gameplay, and advanced technology. We are focused on bringing next generation experiences to gamers who want to enjoy them anywhere, anytime, across multiple genres and devices.

チーム紹介/About the Hiring Team
Lightspeed Tech Center は、PUBG モバイルを始めとする様々な高品質ゲームを手掛けた Lightspeed Studios の研究開発部門です。Tech Center は技術研究とイノベーションを牽引し、ゲーム作品にそのライフサイクルを通して、エンジン、音響、QA、AI、次世代技術、技術提携などのテクニカルサポートを提供しています。
Lightspeed Tech Center is a R&D department under Lightspeed Studios which develop PUBG Mobile and other high-quality games. Our Tech Center leads the research, exploration, and discovery of innovative technologies and provides technical services for all games during all phases of life cycle, including engine, audio, QA, AI, next generation game, technical cooperation, etc.

仕事内容/What the Role Entails
Job Description
- Game Feature Development: Participate in the design, development, and debugging of game client modules, implementing gameplay systems and interaction logic
- Performance Optimization: Analyze and optimize client-side performance, addressing issues related to frame rate, memory usage, and loading times
- Game AI: Contribute to the design and implementation of AI behaviors for NPCs, enemies, and bosses, including behavior trees and state machines
- AI Harness Engineering: Build and iterate on the supporting framework for AI agents in games, including prompt design, tool calling, context management, evaluation pipelines, and the integration of LLMs / agents with the game runtime

応募資格/Who We Look For
Requirements
- Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Game Development, or a related field (Junior year and above for undergraduates / Master's students)
- Proficient in C++
- Hands-on experience with Unreal Engine or Unity
- English: Strong reading and writing skills
- Japanese: JLPT N1 or equivalent proficiency
- Solid foundation in data structures, algorithms, and object-oriented programming
- Genuine passion for game development; an active gamer
- Strong communication and teamwork skills
Nice to Have
- Personal or team-based game development projects (Demos / Game Jams / portfolio works)
- Understanding of network synchronization, physics engines, and related systems
- Experience in AI Harness / Agent framework development (e.g., prompt engineering, tool calling, agent pipeline design, LLM application evaluation)
- Familiarity with reinforcement learning fundamentals (e.g., PPO, DQN, and other common algorithms)
- Familiarity with mainstream LLM APIs or agent development frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen)
- Knowledge of game AI techniques (behavior trees, GOAP, pathfinding algorithms, etc.)
- An active GitHub profile, technical blog, or game portfolio
- Experience with version control tools such as Git or Perforce

賃金
年収額：応相談（昇給/賞与あり）
